expectations.text: Questions naming choice - ReadOnly vs Shared terminology
expectations.evidence: Code already uses ReadOnly in the diff; review does not discuss the naming tradeoff. The human review feedback was about an earlier version that used 'Shared'

expectations.text: Notes attrs field name doesn't convey its role (should be sharedAttrs or promotedAttrs)
Flags sharedAttrs leaking to mocktracer via go:linkname
expectations.evidence: Review notes the mocktracer go:linkname change but does not frame it as an abstraction leak

expectations.text: Suggests extracting shared-attrs building into a helper function
Notes consumers of SpanMeta should use methods, not access internals directly
expectations.evidence: Not flagged; the review focuses on other issues like CI visibility race and benchmark bugs
